name: brain2
description: A self-maintaining, portable personal knowledge base. Captures developer context in the background, distills it into a cross-repo graph, and asks for guidance at one seam: its schema. Skills: /brain2:pickup (where I was + cross-repo selector), /brain2:capture (save context), /brain2:search (grounded answer), /brain2:explore (gap-fill), /brain2:activity (cross-repo work graph), /brain2:schema (design/reshape the KG ontology). Backed by the brain2 MCP server.
